'''''Selonian Fire''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] that participated in the [[Battle of Ciutric]], which occurred in [[9 ABY]], under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]].

Having received a signal from [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], the ''Selonian Fire'' performed the [[Thrawn Pincer]], reverting into real space behind enemy lines, along with the ''[[Corusca Fire]]'', another New Republic ''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer. With their combined firepower, the two Star Destroyers managed to destroy the bridge of [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Reckoning (Imperial II-class)|''Reckoning'']], [[Death/Legends|killing]] Krennel in the process.

{{Ship-stub}}
